caption:
This is how Christmas in New York feels like 🎄🎅

Captured by Cinema SB
Christmas in New York

#newyork #nyc #newyorkcity #cinemasb

transcription.text: Last Christmas I gave you my heart, but the very next day you gave it away. This year, to save me from tears, I'll give it to someone special.
